parsed.result:
Perfect! I've successfully completed the CLSK data scraping task. Here's what I gathered:

## Summary

**Articles collected: 19** (quality over quantity approach)
**Output location:** `/Users/aryaask/Desktop/quant/data/raw/earnings-beatmiss-B/_news/CLSK/`

### Coverage breakdown:
- **Earnings results**: Q1, Q2, Q3, Q4 2024 + FY 2025 + Q2 2026 reports
- **Financial metrics**: Revenue growth, EBITDA, mining costs, hashrate milestones
- **Analyst sentiment**: 12-month price targets ($14–$27), Strong Buy consensus, 109% upside potential
- **Operational data**: Bitcoin production, power costs, facility expansions (Mississippi, Tennessee, Wyoming)
- **Strategic pivots**: AI/HPC infrastructure expansion, Submer partnership, Jeffrey Thomas hire
- **Market factors**: Short interest (32.4%), convertible notes ($1.15B), share buybacks
- **Disruptions**: Hurricane Helene impact and recovery
- **Time span**: 2022–2026, heavily weighted to recent 2024-2026

### Key findings:
- Strong operational growth (33.5→50+ EH/s hashrate) despite profitability challenges
- Transition from pure bitcoin mining to diversified AI infrastructure play
- High short interest creating squeeze potential with bullish technical setup
- Balance sheet strength ($1.2B+ liquidity) supporting aggressive expansion

All articles are saved in strict JSON schema with timestamped metadata. The `_done` manifest confirms completion.

Sources:
- [NASDAQ CLSK Earnings](https://www.nasdaq.com/market-activity/stocks/clsk/earnings)
- [Yahoo Finance CLSK Analysis](https://finance.yahoo.com/quote/CLSK/analysis/)
- [PR Newswire CLSK News](https://www.prnewswire.com/news-releases/cleanspark-reports-transformative-fy-2025-results-302626012.html)
- [CoinDesk Bitcoin Mining Coverage](https://www.coindesk.com/business/)
- [Seeking Alpha CLSK Coverage](https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/CLSK/earnings)
